subject: [PATCH 11/14] nfsd: add netlink upcall for the svc_export cache

2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch adds netlink-based cache upcall support for the svc_export (nfsd.export) cache in the Linux kernel's NFS server component. It introduces a new callback function, nfsd_cache_notify(), which sends a multicast event to userspace when there are pending requests in the cache. The patch also implements two new functions: nfsd_nl_svc_export_get_reqs_dumpit() and nfsd_nl_svc_export_set_reqs_doit(). The first function dumps pending svc_export cache requests over netlink, while the second function parses responses from userspace and updates the cache accordingly. This allows for more efficient management of the svc_export cache and improves communication between the kernel and userspace.
